industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Aydem Yenilenebilir Enerji A.S.
summary: Aydem Yenilenebilir Enerji A.S. operates as a renewable energy company in Turkey. It operates hydroelectric, wind, geothermal, and biogas power plants with a capacity of 1,020 megawatts. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Merkezefendi, Turkey.
